title: Weather: Light rain from this evening
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Along the Garden...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Along the Garden Route it will be fine to partly cloudy, becoming cloudy in the evening with light rainfall. The wind is light to moderate south-westerly from this afternoon.

According to the South African Weather Service, the weather will be fine in the western interior, otherwise partly cloudy and cool to warm but hot in places with isolated to scattered showers and thundershowers in the east but widespread in the south-east on Wednesday.


> A cold front is approaching from the West, with the possibility of light rain overnight, continuing on Wednesday.


Tuesday weather


> Wednesday's weather:


Western CapeFine in the western parts, otherwise partly cloudy and cold to cool but warm in places over the West Coast with isolated rain and showers along the south coast and adjacent interior over the southern parts until the afternoon.

The wind along the coast will be fresh to strong south-easterly to southerly but moderate alongthe south coast. The expected UVB sunburn index: High

Western half of the Eastern CapeCloudy in the east, otherwise partly cloudy and cold, with isolated showers of rain. The wind along the coast will be moderate southerly to south-easterly.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeCloudy and cold with isolated showers and thundershowers, but scattered along the coast and in the east. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh south-westerly.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
